Native New Yorkers here, mom + daughter, looking for adventure and just a fun day on the water and hoping to bring back a fish or two. What we got was so much more!! Capt. Josh, Big J, Dillon and the entire crew were AMAZING and welcomed us aboard, got us set up with rods and set the tone for what was truly a memorable and fun day!  We also had so much fun meeting others and shared stories, recipes and lots of laughs 😂 The day was filled with great tunes, lots of high fives and we went home with fish and new friends! We can’t wait to book our next trip with GypSea and recommend them whether you’re new to fishing or experienced, with family and friends or even a company outing! Shout out to Capt. Josh for going into OT!! We really didn’t want the day to end. THANK YOU!

We heard about Gypsea Charters through the YouTuber Fishing GrubbZ, and we are so glad we booked.

The pricing was great value for a 6-person private charter, and from start to finish the whole experience was absolutely brilliant. The Gypsea team, Georgie and Dillon, were simply the best. We arrived as customers and genuinely left as friends. They went well above and beyond anything we expected, and we can thoroughly recommend them as the best charter team we’ve ever had the pleasure of fishing with.

My son and I had an amazing six-hour trip fishing for striped bass, and we both landed our first stripers and new personal bests. The guys knew exactly where to put us on the fish, and their knowledge, effort and enthusiasm made the whole trip unforgettable.

Lil’ Gypsea is a great vessel, and the supplied tackle was excellent quality. This trip would be perfect for experienced anglers and total beginners alike. One of the six people on our trip had never fished before, and even she landed several really nice fish.

We’re visiting from the UK, but we will absolutely be back to fish with these absolute legends again. We wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Gypsea Charters to anyone looking for a proper New York fishing experience.

Thank you Georgie and Dillon for getting us our first stripers, and for putting me onto such a lunker on my first trip. An unforgettable experience from start to finish, and easily one of the best fishing trips we’ve ever had.
